items.title: Margin & Customer Assurance Workspace
items.description: Margin & Customer Assurance Workspace exists to Give leaders a tighter view of margin, service cost, and customer assurance so commercial tradeoffs stay grounded in reliable operational evidence. The quarter concentrates on traceability, formulation governance, quality-by-design, and sustainability evidence so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase gross margin stability by strengthening customer-specific specs, order transparency, and margin visibility workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase cost-to-serve visibility by strengthening customer-specific specs, order transparency, and margin visibility workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase arr by strengthening customer-specific specs, order transparency, and margin visibility workflows and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Scenario Engine (What-if Workspace) with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Reformulation & Scenario Simulation with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Unified KPI Dashboards with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Impact Factors API.
Introduced workflow updates in Recipe Impact API.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Margin & Customer Assurance Workspace: operating discovery

items.title: Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange Initiative
items.description: Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Price update latency and Inbound interest, anchored in traceability, formula governance, and quality evidence under tighter customer and regulatory scrutiny and led through Supplier Onboarding & Qualification. The quarter concentrates on traceability, formulation governance, quality-by-design, and sustainability evidence so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease price update latency by improving supplier onboarding & qualification and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Increase supplier performance by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase inbound interest by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase outbound touch effectiveness by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease mean time to recover (mttr) by improving supplier onboarding & qualification and removing avoidable workflow friction.
Decrease latency p95 by improving supplier onboarding & qualification and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase inbound interest by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase outbound touch effectiveness by strengthening supplier onboarding & qualification and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Extended Supplier Onboarding & Qualification with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Spec Exchange & Change Notifications with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Spec Management (Product & Material) with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Extended Document & Certificate Center with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced workflow updates in Supplier Spec API.
Introduced workflow updates in Change Notification API.
